steps.title: Find the slope
steps.content: Two points on the line have the same output: $f(0)=f(\cdot)=3$. Slope $=\dfrac{3-3}{\Delta x}=0$, so $f$ is constant.

steps.title: Identify the answer
steps.content: A constant function with value $3$ is $f(x)=3$. That matches choice C — C is correct.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: As a final check, compare the result from the work to the answer choices. The value, equation, or condition found above matches choice C, $ f(x) = 3 $, and the other choices fail the same setup or substitution. Therefore C is correct.
